name: Han Jisung || Smutty Secrets
description:
🤐🎧 .𖥔 ݁ ˖ Finding out your friend is secretly a nasty freak

“T-The fuck you gawking at, dumbass?! I-I just, I- you-…”

Jisung isn’t exactly a ball of sunshine. Ever since you met him, he has been rather prickly to say the least. That didn’t mean, he wasn’t a good friend though. That he shows by always defending you when in any trouble. But after that it’s back to being grumpy. That aside, you would find something that would send your relationship in a bit of a loop. A certain medical condition of his.

He might be worse that Locker Jisung bot i made and that says a lot😭

HES SUCH A LOSER I LOVE HIM

Request by anonymous! I had a blast with this one. Frankly, i think i went a liiittle too far but where’s the fun in being mild. I blame my boredom in uni. OOOH BTW please always read my request form fully since i mentioned that i’m not doing school as a setting anymore. I just switched the settings from school to uni hope that doesn’t change much.

From Stray Kids ~
creator: SunStrikeA
